The '''Greenhouse''' was a large [[Tea/Legends|tea]] house located within [[Ganza Park]] in the [[Estalle Island|island]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Estalle]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Procopia/Legends|Procopia]]. The building had a picturesque view of the [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] from where it was built, and was named for the fact its walls were made of heavy crystal [[Glass/Legends|glass]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the tea house was open to all despite expensive prices, and was considered one of the highlights of the park.<ref name="LotE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Greenhouse was first mentioned in the campaign guide included in ''[[Lords of the Expanse]]'', a [[1997]] supplement written by [[Paul Sudlow]] and [[Chris Doyle]] for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' by [[West End Games]].
